zh.lifeSummary: 當Tomkin De Turberville於1310年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Hamon de Turburville28歲，母親Isabel de Penrees21歲。他於從1345年到1350年與Gwenllian Norreys在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1370年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tomkin De Turberville于1310年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Hamon de Turburville28岁，母亲Isabel de Penrees21岁。他于从1345年到1350年与Gwenllian Norreys在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1370年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turberville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, probably from Thouberville (Eure), or possibly from Trubleville (Seine-Maritime), both in France. The two may have been confused in surname usage.

variants.name: Torbet
meanings: Scottish:

from the Anglo-Norman and Middle English personal name T(h)urbert, T(h)orbert, a hybrid of Old Norse Thorr ‘Thor’, the name of the god of thunder, + ancient Germanic -berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was probably formed on the Continent; see Turberville .
perhaps in some cases a nickname from Old French and Middle English turbot, turbut ‘turbot’, for someone who caught or sold or resembled this fish.

variants.name: Turbyfill
meanings: Altered form of English   Turberville  .

variants.name: Tuberville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Turberville  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Turville
meanings: English (Surrey and Hampshire; of Norman origin):
habitational name from Tourville‐la‐Campagne (Eure, France). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Thórr + Old French ville ‘farmstead, estate’ (from Latin villa).
occasionally a shortened form of   Turberville  .

variants.name: Turbeville
meanings: English: variant of   Turberville  .

variants.name: Troublefield
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Turberville  .

nameMeanings.name: Tomkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name T(h)omkin, a diminutive of T(h)om(me) ( see Thom ), itself a pet form of Thomas .

variants.name: Thomas
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

variants.name: Tamkin
meanings: Contracted form of Latinate Thomasina, a feminine form of Thomas . This was relatively common throughout Britain in the Middle Ages, but confined to Cornwall immediately before its recent revival.

variants.name: Tomkins
meanings: English (mainly East Midlands): variant of Tomkin, from the Middle English personal name T(h)omkin, a pet form of T(h)om(me) (see Thom ), itself a pet form of Thomas .

variants.name: Tomkinson
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)omkin (see Tomkins ) + -son ‘son of T(h)omkin’.

variants.name: Thom
meanings: Written abbreviated form of   Thomas .

variants.name: Tompkin
meanings: English: variant of Tomkin with instrusive -p-.

variants.name: Tonkin
meanings: English (Cornwall): variant of Tomkin (see Tomkins ), where /m/ has developed to /ŋ/ before /k/. Compare Sincock as a variant of Simcock .

variants.name: Tonkyn
meanings: English: variant of   Tomkin  , where /m/ has developed to /ŋ/ before /k/.

variants.name: Thomkin
meanings: English:  see  Tomkin  .

variants.name: Tonking
meanings: English: variant of Tomkin , where -ing has been substituted for -in and /m/ has developed to /ŋ/ before /k/.

en.lifeSummary: When Tomkin De Turberville was born in 1310, in Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Hamon de Turburville, was 28 and his mother, Isabel de Penrees, was 21. He married Gwenllian Norreys from 1345 to 1350, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1370, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.of Tythegston, Glamorgan, Wales: Tythegston, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tomkin De Turberville est né en 1310, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Hamon de Turburville, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Penrees, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian Norreys du 1345 au 1350, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1370, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tomkin De Turberville 1310 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamon de Turburville 28 und seine Mutter Isabel de Penrees 21. Er hat von 1345 bis 1350 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Gwenllian Norreys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1370 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Gwenllian Norreys da 1345 a 1350, nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1370, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Tomkin De Turbervilleが1310年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Hamon de Turburvilleは28歳，母Isabel de Penreesは21歳であった。から1345年まで1350年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでGwenllian Norreysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1370年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Tomkin De Turberville(이)가 1310년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamon de Turburville(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Penrees(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1345년 부터 1350년 까지 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Gwenllian Norreys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tomkin De Turberville nasceu em 1310, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Hamon de Turburville, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Penrees, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian Norreys de 1345 a 1350, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1370, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tomkin De Turberville родился в 1310 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Hamon de Turburville было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Penrees, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian Norreys с 1345 по 1350 в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1370 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.
